title: Vendor in latest containers/image
body:
Fixes the naming issue of blobs and config for the dir transport
by removing the .tar extension

Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/481

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @umohnani8 Looks like buildah needs some fixes to allow this to compile.
Just made the fix, tests should pass now.

:pushpin: Commit aa645cb has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan aa645cbfd7bab23665fd42352845bca04c13234b -->
@umohnani8 is this important enough to cut a new version of buildah, 0.13 is was cut today, but I could rebase on this.
@rhatdan this fixes the misleading name of the blobs and config in the directory when an image is pushed using the dir transport. I am not sure if it is important enough, your call.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/669ffddd999061976a98e1c05ebcdd42065188fc.1519326981366640896/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 669ffddd999061976a98e1c05ebcdd42065188fc to master...
